title: Bring a Cat from China to the USA (2026 Guide)
summary: Requirements for importing a cat from China to the United States.
process_steps: Microchip the pet|Administer rabies vaccination|Obtain export health certificate|Complete CDC import form|Travel with approved airline
required_documents: Export Health Certificate|Rabies Vaccination Certificate|CDC Import Form
tips: Health certificates must be endorsed by government veterinarians.

title: Bring a Dog from China to the USA (2026 Guide)
summary: Strict CDC requirements apply for importing a dog from China (high-risk country) to the USA.
process_steps: Microchip the dog|Administer rabies vaccination|Pass Rabies Titer Test|Obtain CDC Dog Import Permit|Obtain export health certificate|Travel with approved airline
required_documents: Export Health Certificate|Rabies Vaccination Certificate|CDC Dog Import Permit|Titer Test Results
tips: China is on the CDC high-risk list. A valid Rabies Titer Test and CDC Permit are mandatory for dogs.
